title: Aehr Test Systems Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Aehr Test Systems held its Q4 2023 earnings call reporting record full-year results. The company achieved net revenue of $65 million for fiscal year 2023, representing 28% year-over-year growth. GAAP gross margin improved significantly to 50.4%, up 390 basis points from the prior year. Non-GAAP net income increased 62% to a record $17.3 million. Management highlighted successful customer wins in silicon carbide and emerging silicon photonics markets. The company guided for continued growth in fiscal 2024 with revenues expected to exceed $65 million. Key growth drivers included expanding EV semiconductor testing demand and early AI-related opportunities.
